race.comment: AUTUMN GLOW (8) undefeated mare who looks set for another all-conquering campaign. Gave the bulk of these a cold first-up with a slick win from the wide draw over 1400m in the G2 Apollo Stakes at this track. Gets the gun run over the mile and hard to see them turn the tables with her explosive turn of foot. CEOLWULF (1) pulled up with blood in the nostrils first-up after the tough run when sixth in the G2 Apollo Stakes. Since cleared by the vets and he gets a much better set-up for this. SIR DELIUS (2) sharp Group 1 entire who meets AUTUMN GLOW for the first time. Prep was prematurely ended in the spring after winning the G1 Turnbull over 2000m at Flemington last October. Primed with the three trials and expected to make a bold showing. AELIANA (9) strong late when second over 1400m in the G2 Apollo Stakes first-up. Will drift back from the draw and give away a big start. Place best. LINDERMANN (3) one of several Waller runners who should ensure a good tempo. Slim place chance.
